ValidationRule.description: Length of ZIP for CH and DE
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
OR(
AND( TEXT(LocationCountry__c)="SWITZERLAND", NOT(ISBLANK(LocationZip__c)), NOT(LEN(LocationZip__c )=4) ), AND( TEXT(BillingCountry__c)="SWITZERLAND", NOT(ISBLANK(BillingZip__c)), NOT(LEN(BillingZip__c )=4) ), AND( TEXT(LocationCountry__c)="GERMANY", NOT(ISBLANK(LocationZip__c)), NOT(LEN(LocationZip__c )=5) ), AND( TEXT(BillingCountry__c)="GERMANY", NOT(ISBLANK(BillingZip__c)), NOT(LEN(BillingZip__c )=5) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The ZIP is not correct, please adjust. (ACM011)
